title: Glossary Page Spec Workflow Sample
summary: A small generated glossary page that demonstrates the page-spec bundle workflow for glossary entries.

definition.title: Definition
definition.body: A reviewable glossary page bundle produced by the page-spec generator instead of hand-written MDX boilerplate.

whyItMatters.title: Why It Matters
whyItMatters.body: Maintainers can validate one glossary input shape and trust matching page, message, asset, and registry files.
